reproduction_policy: Every finding below was reproduced against the actual files before any edit. Findings are NOT disputed.

findings.root_cause: Quorum is derived from PROFILE NAME alone. execution_mode is never consulted. The three mock adapters (scripts/council/providers/*_mock.py) return contract-valid responses, validate.py ACCEPTS them, and aggregate() then treats them as validated live members.

empirical_repro.verdict: CONFIRMED. Status is correctly downgraded, but quorum is TRUE on pure mock evidence. Any consumer reading frontier_council_quorum sees a live council that does not exist.

findings.aggravating_factor: The MOCK_FRONTIER_CONTRACT_PASS downgrade fires only if coordination/council/frontier_seat_contracts.json still literally says status=FROZEN_MOCK_ONLY. Editing one string in a data file silently promotes mock evidence to PASS.

findings.finding: Multiple packages appear READY or authorization-eligible, including TEST.
findings.root_cause: Eligibility was per-package self-assertion with no central registry. Five packages carried validation_status=PASS / READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW simultaneously; backend/main.py additionally resolved 'the active candidate' by lexicographic sort of a directory listing, which selects HELM-H1-CANDIDATE-TEST-H1-RUN-BCAFCE1E because "T" > "2".

findings.finding: Production enforcement currently relies mainly on BudgetGovernor.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED. It is a spend limiter, not an authorization validator.

findings.finding: Production code does not fully bind package_id, authorization_id, combined_authorization_sha256, exact providers, exact models, request digests.
findings.evidence: grep of backend/ and scripts/ shows the ONLY production readers of frontier_authorization.json are backend/main.py:18040 (display only) and budget_governor.py (cost only). No production code path compares package_id, authorization_id, combined_authorization_sha256, provider set, model set, or any request digest.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED. Binding is absent, not merely incomplete.
CONFIRMED. The validator is defined inside the test module and imported by nothing in production. The tests were proving a validator that does not ship.

findings.evidence: No consume/claim/redeem function anywhere in scripts/council/. scripts/council/h1b_authorization_gate.py accepts consumed_authorization_ids as an IN-MEMORY set parameter supplied by the caller -- it is per-process, non-durable, and trivially bypassed by starting a new process.

No authorization_ledger.jsonl or equivalent. Replay protection is asserted in generate_h1_package.py:348 as a STRING ('authorization_replay_protection': 'BOUND_TO_SINGLE_UNIQUE_RUN_ID') with no code enforcing it.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED. Replay protection was a claim in a JSON field, not a mechanism.

findings.finding: UI does not clearly separate package readiness / credential readiness / founder authorization / live proof / frontier quorum / promotion.
collapsed_fields: h1_candidate_package: 'READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW' -- a generic READY badge that merges package integrity with founder authorization
no LIVE PROVIDER PROOF state exists at all (NOT RUN / PARTIAL / PASS / FAILED)
FOUNDER AUTHORIZATION has no CONSUMED or REJECTED state

findings.finding: Residual urllib/network path exists in adapters.py.
findings.root_cause: dispatch() gates frontier members on a contracts file read from scripts/council/frontier_seat_contracts.json -- a path that DOES NOT EXIST (the real file lives at coordination/council/frontier_seat_contracts.json). The guard therefore passes by accident of a wrong path, not by design. If external_execution_authorized were ever true, dispatch() raises -- but call_openai_compat / call_anthropic / call_gemini remain importable, reachable functions holding a live urllib POST path with no authorization check of their own.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED. Defense depends on a path typo.

findings.finding: No external paid calls are currently fireable.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED (favorable). dispatch() raises PermissionError on the frontier branch; harness supplies no key; zero calls observed.

findings.finding: No live secrets were found in package artifacts.
findings.verdict: CONFIRMED (favorable). Structural scan of all live_proof_packages found no bearer-token-shaped values and no credential value keys.
